# moodle-cli 0.3.1

## Summary

This patch release fixes the release packaging metadata for `0.3.0`.

The forum functionality shipped in `0.3.0` is unchanged. `0.3.1` only refreshes the lockfile so CI, release builds, and downstream installs use a consistent package version.

## Fix

- refreshed `uv.lock` to match `pyproject.toml` version `0.3.1`

## Validation

Validated with:

- `uv sync --locked`
- `python -m pytest -q`
- `uv build`
